purpose: Shinobi is an autonomous Windows-native AI assistant designed for Spanish-speaking YouTubers, enabling workflows and tasks using automation.

key_files.name: package.json
key_files.role: Defines project metadata, dependencies, scripts, and build configurations.

key_files.name: README.md
key_files.role: Provides an overview of the project, setup instructions, and documentation for users.

key_files.name: tsconfig.json
key_files.role: Configures TypeScript compiler options for the project.

concerns: No tests are currently specified in the package.json.
The README suggests editing a .env file for configuration, requiring external API keys.
The project uses an MIT license, but it also mentions ISC in README.
Development scripts rely on ts-node, requiring TypeScript knowledge.
Some sections in the README detail blocks that might not have dedicated testing.

purpose: The src branch houses the core application source files, encompassing both general project configuration and specialized utilities for repository interaction.

key_files.name: README.md
key_files.role: Project documentation and overview

key_files.name: package.json
key_files.role: Project metadata and dependencies configuration

key_files.name: tools/browser_click.ts
key_files.role: Defines a tool for clicking elements in a browser via CDP.

key_files.name: reader/cli.ts
key_files.role: Provides CLI integration for reading repositories using specified options.

key_files.name: build.gradle
key_files.role: Build tool configuration

concerns: No installation or setup instructions in README.md.
No tests are present for tools and reader functionalities.
LICENSE file is present but not clearly stated in README.md.
package.json has several unused dependencies.
Error handling could be improved for better debugging.

purpose: This branch contains various scripts focused on data extraction and interaction with web pages, including analyses on NotebookLM and CoinGecko.

key_files.name: notebooklm/inspect_card_structure.ts
key_files.role: Inspects the DOM structure of NotebookLM and saves the inventory.

key_files.name: notebooklm/n1_list_notebooks.ts
key_files.role: Lists notebooks from NotebookLM and determines the best selector.

key_files.name: coingecko/c1_top_ranking.ts
key_files.role: Fetches top ranking coins from CoinGecko and saves the results.

key_files.name: coingecko/c2_position_183.ts
key_files.role: Retrieves information about a coin at a specific rank from CoinGecko.

key_files.name: package.json
key_files.role: Defines project metadata, dependencies, and scripts for building and running the project.

concerns: The scripts depend on a local Chrome instance for Playwright and may fail if not running.
Hardcoded paths may cause issues when running on different machines.
There are no tests included for any of the scripts.
The extracted data may require validation for accuracy after scraping.
README.md is missing a usage example.

purpose: Compile essential documentation providing context, workflow details, development phases, and management strategies for the project.

key_files.role: Introduction and operational rules

key_files.role: Architecture overview

key_files.role: Product development phases

key_files.role: Current status of the project

key_files.role: Known technical issues

key_files.role: Architectural decisions

key_files.role: Session log detailing task validation

key_files.name: 01_inno_setup.md
key_files.role: Inno Setup installer creation manual

concerns: Multiple bugs listed as pending across sessions, including CAPTCHA issues.
Careful management of deployment steps indicated in session notes.
Incomplete automation for Inno Setup, with manual steps detailed.
Risk of spam/phishing due to email settings lacking SPF, DKIM, DMARC.
Validation pending for Cloudflare email routing as described.

purpose: This branch consolidates metadata, configurations, and data analysis outputs from NotebookLM and CoinGecko, providing comprehensive project information and external data insights.

key_files.name: package.json
key_files.role: Project configuration and dependencies management

key_files.name: README.md
key_files.role: Project overview and instructions

key_files.name: LICENSE
key_files.role: Legal terms under which the project is distributed

key_files.name: notebooklm/card_structure_inspection.json
key_files.role: Contains structure and element details of NotebookLM card inspection.

key_files.name: notebooklm/n1_notebooks.json
key_files.role: Lists notebook titles and UI component selectors for NotebookLM.

key_files.name: coingecko/c1_raw.json
key_files.role: Raw data from CoinGecko including navigated URLs and analysis.

key_files.name: coingecko/c1_top.json
key_files.role: Top coins' data extracted from CoinGecko with rankings and prices.

concerns: No explicit mention of error handling or fallback mechanisms in the data retrieval.
Lack of tests or validation for the retrieved data from both NotebookLM and CoinGecko.
Duplicated elements in notebook titles that might indicate redundant data entries.
Extremely long body text in CoinGecko raw output might create parsing issues.
Unclear navigation paths in the CoinGecko analysis could impact data retrieval.

purpose: Contains various reports, configurations, and auditing files for managing project functionalities.

key_files.role: Audit report indicating a failing verdict due to high risks

key_files.role: Metadata for agent performance including target and budget

concerns: Audit of dot-prop shows high risks and lack of edge case tests.
Audit of escape-string-regexp reveals no tests for edge cases.
Meta report indicates operational budget but lacks completeness.
Shinobi's architecture lacks testing and error handling strategies.
Desktop skills README suggests TODOs for validation on actual machines.
